Introduction
    London brothers Terry and Ian Blaine have serious financial woes. When their wealthy uncle Howard Swann proposes that they turn to crime to solve their problems, things go badly and the two become enemies in Woody Allen's dark tale.

Filming locations: Grand Union Canal, London, Greater London, England, UK
